checks.name: Leaflet owns zoom, pan, markers, and clusters
Refresh restores the working street map
Mosque card and selected marker are stable
Selection does not scroll the page
Marker click opens the mosque card
Search synchronizes the list and markers
Tile errors keep the street map active
Tile errors produce one non-blocking message
1920x1080 keeps the mosque card in view
1440x1000 keeps the mosque card in view
1280x800 keeps the mosque card in view
1024x900 keeps the mosque card in view
768x1024 keeps the mosque card in view
430x932 keeps the mosque card in view
Mobile list tab shows one view at a time
390x844 keeps the mosque card in view
360x800 keeps the mosque card in view
Coordinate picker uses Leaflet and the legacy street raster
No tile API key is exposed
